response_text:
As of March 11, 2026, the latest stable release of Python is version 3.14.3, which was released on February 3, 2026. ([python.org](https://www.python.org/downloads/?pubDate=20260124&utm_source=openai))

Python 3.14 introduced several new features and optimizations, including:

- **Enhanced Performance**: Improvements in the interpreter have led to faster execution times for many applications.

- **Pattern Matching Enhancements**: The structural pattern matching introduced in Python 3.10 has been refined, offering more expressive and efficient patterns.

- **Deprecation of Legacy Modules**: Some older modules have been deprecated or removed to streamline the standard library.

For a comprehensive list of changes and detailed release notes, you can visit the official Python website. ([python.org](https://www.python.org/downloads/?pubDate=20260124&utm_source=openai))

Looking ahead, Python 3.15 is scheduled for release on October 1, 202
